info.title: Custom T-Shirt Brand API
info.description: REST API for the custom T-shirt e-commerce platform. All responses use the `{ success, message?, data }` / `{ success: false, error }` envelope. Money is always a decimal string; order totals are recomputed server-side.

bearerAuth.description: Access token from POST /auth/otp/verify (15 min TTL).

adminKey.name: x-admin-key
adminKey.description: Admin API key (labeled keys via ADMIN_API_KEYS).

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code, e.g. INSUFFICIENT_STOCK

post.summary: Send a login OTP (rate limited per number + per IP)

200.description: Send a login OTP (rate limited per number + per IP)

post.summary: Verify OTP; returns access + refresh tokens

200.description: Verify OTP; returns access + refresh tokens

post.summary: Rotate refresh token (reuse detection revokes the family)

200.description: Rotate refresh token (reuse detection revokes the family)

401.description: Invalid, expired, or reused refresh token

post.summary: Revoke all sessions for the authenticated user

200.description: Revoke all sessions for the authenticated user

post.summary: Create a draft custom order (guest or authenticated)

201.description: Create a draft custom order (guest or authenticated)

get.summary: Fetch a custom order (owner or capability-by-id)

200.description: Fetch a custom order (owner or capability-by-id)

post.summary: Presigned upload URL for a design file (15 min TTL, MIME allowlist)

200.description: Presigned upload URL for a design file (15 min TTL, MIME allowlist)

patch.summary: Attach an uploaded design file (own-storage URLs only)

200.description: Attach an uploaded design file (own-storage URLs only)

post.summary: Submit draft (SUBMITTED, or QUOTED for INSTANT pricing)

200.description: Submit draft (SUBMITTED, or QUOTED for INSTANT pricing)

post.summary: Create order from cart — totals recomputed server-side, stock reserved atomically

201.description: Create order from cart — totals recomputed server-side, stock reserved atomically

get.summary: Guest order tracking by id + mobile

200.description: Guest order tracking by id + mobile

post.summary: Create a gateway checkout session for a payable order

200.description: Create a gateway checkout session for a payable order

post.summary: Gateway webhook (HMAC over raw body; no auth header)

200.description: Gateway webhook (HMAC over raw body; no auth header)

post.summary: Regenerate a checkout session for a failed payment

200.description: Regenerate a checkout session for a failed payment

post.summary: Add an address (first or explicit default becomes default)

201.description: Add an address (first or explicit default becomes default)

get.summary: Build a wa.me click-to-chat deep link

200.description: Build a wa.me click-to-chat deep link
